# `ClearScreen`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128, VIC20, NES, PET  
**Parameters:** `b, a`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>ClearScreen( [byte], [address] );</h3>
<ul>
<li>[byte] - value to use to clear the screen</li>
<li>[address] - address of the screen memory</li>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Fills the memory address with 40*25 = 1000 bytes of the value specified.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
ClearScreen($20, ^$0400); // Clears screen bank 1 with a space character ($20)
ClearScreen(RED, ^$D800); // Fills color ram with red
</code>


</div>
